summary: Frontend testing complete for Bereavement Support feature on Friends & Family page. All 8 tests passed - page loads correctly, bereavement card appears in main view, navigation to bereavement view works, all 8 resources displayed with phone numbers and external links, DMWS featured card present at bottom.
critical_code_review_comments: BEREAVEMENT_RESOURCES array correctly includes all 8 resources as specified (Lines 62-71)
Bereavement card in main view has correct data-testid='bereavement-card' (Line 296)
Resource cards in bereavement view have data-testid='bereavement-resource-{index}' (Line 660)
DMWS featured card correctly displays at bottom with Visit DMWS link (Lines 688-703)
Phone numbers are displayed with clickable phone icon using Linking.openURL for tel: links
External links have proper external-link-alt icon and onPress handlers
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bereavement Support feature fully implemented and tested on Friends & Family page. Resources include DMWS (Defence Medical Welfare Service), Cruse Bereavement Support, Scotty's Little Soldiers, Beyond the Wire, Forces Support, WAY (Widowed & Young), SSAFA Bereaved Families, and ABF The Soldiers Charity. Page uses view state to switch between main and bereavement views.

friends_family_page_load.details: Page loads correctly at /family-friends after password authentication

bereavement_card_main_view.details: Bereavement Support card with dove icon appears after Support Services card

bereavement_navigation.details: Clicking bereavement card navigates to bereavement view with setView('bereavement')

bereavement_resources_display.details: All 8 resources displayed: DMWS, Cruse, Scotty's Little Soldiers, Beyond the Wire, Forces Support, WAY, SSAFA, ABF

phone_numbers_clickable.details: Phone numbers displayed in green with phone icon - resources with phones: DMWS (01011 736012), Cruse (0808 808 1677), SSAFA (0800 260 6767), ABF (020 7901 8900)

external_links.details: All resource cards have external link icons and are clickable to open external URLs

dmws_featured_card.details: DMWS featured card appears at bottom with hands-helping icon, description mentioning support since 1943, and Visit DMWS button

back_navigation.details: Back arrow in header allows navigation back to main view (setView('main'))

design_review.purple_theme: Bereavement section uses purple accent color (#7c3aed) appropriately for sensitive topic
design_review.info_card_styling: Heart icon intro card with appropriate messaging for bereaved families
design_review.tip_card: Scotty's Little Soldiers highlighted in tip card with child icon
design_review.contrast: Good text contrast throughout, green phone numbers clearly visible
design_review.spacing: Proper padding and margins between resource cards
